title: ADC-based closed-loop control
description: The system shall implement ADC-based closed-loop control using potentiometer feedback.

title: UART control and diagnostics
description: The system shall provide UART-based control and diagnostics.

title: Compliance with ISO 16750
description: The system design shall consider compliance with ISO 16750 – Road Vehicles Environmental Conditions.

title: Compliance with ISO 7637
description: The system design shall consider compliance with ISO 7637 – Electrical Transient Immunity.

title: Compliance with IEC 61000-4
description: The system design shall consider compliance with IEC 61000-4 – EMC Immunity.

title: MISRA-C guidelines
description: The system design shall consider compliance with MISRA-C – Software Coding Guidelines (Recommended).

title: Actuator supply voltage
description: Supply voltage shall be 12V DC.

title: Actuator feedback type
description: Feedback type shall be analog potentiometer.

title: Read actuator feedback ADC
description: The controller shall read the ADC value from the actuator feedback potentiometer.

title: Control actuator based on ADC
description: The controller shall control the actuator based on the measured ADC value.

title: Stop at shipping position
description: The controller shall stop the actuator at a defined shipping position represented by a configured ADC threshold.

title: UART ON/OFF control
description: The controller shall allow actuator ON and OFF control through UART communication.

title: Continuous ADC acquisition
description: The system shall continuously acquire actuator feedback using the internal ADC.

title: ADC resolution
description: ADC resolution shall be minimum 12-bit.

title: ADC sampling frequency
description: ADC sampling frequency shall be ≥ 1 kHz.

title: ADC as primary feedback
description: ADC value shall be treated as the primary feedback variable.

title: ADC-based flap control
description: The system shall control flap actuation exclusively based on the measured ADC feedback value from the actuator potentiometer.

title: Flap actuation ADC range
description: Flap actuation shall operate within an ADC range of 500 to 2600 counts.

title: Control decisions from ADC
description: Control decisions shall be derived solely from the real-time ADC feedback signal.

title: No open-loop control
description: Open-loop control shall not be permitted under any operating condition.

title: Actuator movement window
description: The actuator shall move the flap only within the defined ADC window (500 ≤ ADC ≤ 2600).

title: Disable drive output out of range
description: The actuator drive output shall be disabled immediately if ADC value falls below 500 or ADC value exceeds 2600.

title: Stop at target ADC
description: The actuator shall stop when the configured target ADC value within the 500–2600 range is reached.

title: Monitor power supply voltage
description: The system shall monitor the external power supply voltage using an ADC channel through a resistive voltage divider network.

title: Scale and measure supply voltage
description: The external supply voltage shall be scaled using a voltage divider and measured via an internal ADC channel.

title: Continuous ADC monitoring for supply voltage
description: The measured ADC value shall be continuously monitored to determine the actual supply voltage.

title: Configurable overvoltage threshold
description: A configurable threshold value (Overvoltage_Threshold) shall define the maximum permissible supply voltage.

title: Disable actuator on overvoltage
description: When the measured supply voltage equals or exceeds the configured Overvoltage_Threshold: Actuator drive output shall be disabled immediately.

title: Block actuator operation on overvoltage
description: When the measured supply voltage equals or exceeds the configured Overvoltage_Threshold: Further actuator operation shall be blocked.

title: Transition to FAULT on overvoltage
description: When the measured supply voltage equals or exceeds the configured Overvoltage_Threshold: System state shall transition to FAULT.

title: Transmit overvoltage fault message
description: When the measured supply voltage equals or exceeds the configured Overvoltage_Threshold: UART diagnostic message “OVERVOLTAGE_FAULT_ACTIVE” shall be transmitted.

title: FAULT state exit conditions
description: The system shall remain in FAULT state until: Supply voltage returns within acceptable limits, and System reset or authorized UART command is received.

title: Continuous overvoltage detection
description: The overvoltage detection mechanism shall operate continuously during all active system states.

title: UART-based actuator control
description: The system shall allow actuator control via UART commands.

title: Minimum UART commands
description: Minimum supported commands: ACTUATOR_ON and ACTUATOR_OFF.

title: ACTUATOR_ON behavior
description: Upon receiving ACTUATOR_ON, actuator operation shall begin according to control logic.

title: ACTUATOR_OFF behavior
description: Upon receiving ACTUATOR_OFF, actuator output shall be disabled immediately.

title: Invalid command handling
description: Invalid commands shall be ignored and logged.

title: Nominal supply voltage
description: Nominal Supply Voltage: 12V.

title: Supply operating range
description: Operating Range: 9V – 16V.

title: Reverse polarity protection
description: Reverse polarity protection shall be implemented.

title: Transient voltage suppression
description: Transient voltage suppression shall be implemented.

title: ADC resolution
description: ADC resolution: Minimum 12-bit.

title: ADC reference voltage
description: Reference Voltage: 3.3V.

title: ADC sampling frequency
description: Sampling frequency: ≥ 1 kHz.

title: ADC input overvoltage protection
description: ADC input shall include overvoltage protection.

title: MCU required peripherals
description: The MCU shall provide: 12-bit ADC – PA1, GPIO Actuator Control Pin – PA5, Advanced PWM Timers, UART (≥1 channel), DMA support, Independent Watchdog.

title: System clock configuration
description: System clock shall be configured to ensure stable control loop operation.

title: Layered software architecture
description: The software shall follow a layered architecture: HAL Layer, Driver Layer, Middleware Layer, Application Layer.

title: Operating states
description: The system shall implement the following states: INIT, IDLE, ACTIVE, SHIPPING_LOCK, FAULT.

title: Independent watchdog
description: An independent watchdog shall be implemented.

title: Automatic reset on malfunction
description: The system shall reset automatically in case of software malfunction.

title: Closed-loop control using ADC feedback
description: Closed-loop control shall be implemented using ADC feedback only.

title: Control loop frequency
description: Control loop frequency shall be ≥ 1 kHz.

title: Actuator stop at thresholds
description: Actuator shall stop at configured ADC thresholds.

title: Prevent oscillation or instability
description: Control logic shall prevent oscillation or unstable behavior.

title: No position or angle conversion
description: No physical position or angle conversion shall be implemented.

title: Periodic UART transmission
description: The system shall periodically transmit: Raw ADC value, System state, Shipping lock status, Fault flags.

title: UART baud rate
description: UART Configuration: Baud Rate: 115200.

title: UART format
description: UART Configuration: Format: 8N1.

title: UART transmission interval
description: UART Configuration: Transmission interval ≤ 100 ms.

title: Protection and diagnostics functions
description: The system shall implement: Overcurrent shutdown, Thermal shutdown (MCU internal temperature monitoring), Stall detection, Short-circuit protection, Undervoltage detection (<9V), Watchdog supervision.

title: Fault transition on any fault
description: Any fault condition shall transition the system to FAULT state.

title: Operating temperature range
description: Operating Temperature: -40°C to +85°C.

title: Storage temperature range
description: Storage Temperature: -40°C to +105°C.

title: Humidity requirement
description: Humidity: 95% RH non-condensing.

title: POC continuous ADC acquisition
description: The POC shall demonstrate: Continuous ADC acquisition.

title: POC actuator control via ADC feedback
description: The POC shall demonstrate: Actuator control based on ADC feedback.

title: POC hard stop at Shipping_ADC_Value
description: The POC shall demonstrate: Hard stop at configured Shipping_ADC_Value.

title: POC UART ON/OFF control
description: The POC shall demonstrate: Successful ON/OFF control via UART.

title: POC fault detection and state transition
description: The POC shall demonstrate: Correct fault detection and system state transition.

title: Deliver system architecture diagram
description: Supplier shall provide: System Architecture Diagram.

title: Deliver schematic
description: Supplier shall provide: Schematic.

title: Deliver PCB layout
description: Supplier shall provide: PCB Layout.

title: Deliver firmware source code
description: Supplier shall provide: Firmware Source Code.

title: Deliver calibration procedure
description: Supplier shall provide: Calibration Procedure.

title: Deliver test report
description: Supplier shall provide: Test Report.

title: Deliver demonstration video
description: Supplier shall provide: Demonstration Video.
